triage_profile.key_note: 39 Sent hits = meaningful bidirectional component. B-001 baseline confirmed: 0 RF-07 primary signals in the low-conflict Jan-Oct 2022 period. Flooding threshold (5+ messages/10 min without response) and continuation-after-stop boundary are the primary classification mechanisms. May 2025 spike (hot period) linked to Eli beginning to hold communication boundaries — Melissa's escalation in response is RF-07 per CP1 context.

cross_rf_context.cross_rf_note: RF-07 complete. 4 compound patterns generated (COMP-RF07-001 through COMP-RF07-004). All compound with RF-04; COMP-RF07-001 and COMP-RF07-002 are triple-compounds with RF-05 also. RF-07 confirmed flooding (S-012 Apr 12 2026) retroactively supports flooding-candidate designations for S-001 (Aug 2024) and S-004 (Aug 2025) — raw timestamp review at synthesis will confirm.

key_findings.confirmed_flooding: S-012 (Apr 12 2026): 5 messages in 3:14 (14:24:25–14:27:39 UTC) — only ADD-001-confirmed flooding event in dataset
key_findings.flooding_candidates: S-001 (Aug 4-5 2024 ~80 msgs) and S-004 (Aug 14-15 2025 ~80 msgs) — pending synthesis timestamp confirmation
key_findings.most_distinctive_signal: S-003 (May 2025): Melissa issues 'stop texting me / harassment' stop command then immediately continues messaging — clearest continuation-after-self-demand in dataset
key_findings.phase_c_pattern: Sev-1 signals in Phase C (S-007 through S-011) confirm pattern maintenance without attenuation — response-time norm-setting, legal-evidence coercion, punitive non-disclosure
key_findings.arc_state: ARC-RF07-001 ACTIVE; unresolved at dataset close; 12 signals (4 Sev-2, 8 Sev-1)

session_log.notes: RF-07 pass initialized. B-001 calibration batch processed (365 messages, Jan-Oct 2022). Zero primary RF-07 flags — confirms low baseline in cooperative early period. No message flooding instances (longest rapid cluster ROW-50-61 spans 34 minutes). Arc state initialized at zero. CP2 calibration questions generated across 5 dimensions. Halted per protocol.

CP2 calibration completed. 4 addenda confirmed (ADD-001 through ADD-004). Full pass completed B-002 through B-031 in single session. 12 primary signals: 4 Sev-2 (S-001 Aug 2024 flooding candidate, S-003 May 2025 continuation-after-self-demand, S-004 Aug 2025 flooding candidate, S-012 Apr 2026 CONFIRMED FLOODING), 8 Sev-1 (S-002, S-005 through S-011). 4 compound patterns (all with RF-04; COMP-RF07-001 and COMP-RF07-002 also with RF-05). ARC-RF07-001 unresolved at dataset close. Arc state file written to analysis-output/arc-states/RF-07-arc-state.json.
